title: clermontia calophylla
intro: Clermontia calophylla, also known as the red flowering Clermontia, is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clermontia calophylla include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Clermontia calophylla can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
